title: Extra Advancements
body:
># Extra Advancements
A mod about adding some unique additional advancements
![3 of the mod's advancements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89a9b2430a97b83364640e8049a6c0dac10845b2.png)

<center>

### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click)
[![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN)

(If you find a bug, please make a bug report on the [curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-advancement))

</center>

>## CONTENT

### || List of all advancements:
>Desperation

Eat rotten flesh from a zombie

>Heavyweight

Obtain a Heavy Core

>Courageous

Kill a creeper with a melee attack

>Secret Knowledge

Obtain an Enchanted Book

>Disc of The Depths

Craft Music Disc 5 from Disc Fragments

>Illager War Horn

Obtain a Goat Horn

>Extra Inventory

Craft a Shulker Box

>Shard of Silence

Find an Echo Shard

>Infected Depths

Enter the Deep Dark

>Power of The Ocean

Obtain a Heart of The Sea

>Overpowered

Eat an Enchanted Golden Apple

>Delicate Crystals

Obtain an Amethyst Shard

>Insane Dedication

Obtain a Netherite Block

### || Q&A:

> Q: Will you port to (x) version?

A: If it's not already ported, probably not.

> Q: When will this be updated?

A: When i feel like it

> Q: Can i include this in my modpack?

A: If it's on CurseForge or Modrinth, sure.

<center>
